ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "article_sha256" TEXT /* SHA256 hash of the article content */,
  "quiz_task_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the quiz task associated with the article */,
  "schema_namespace" TEXT /* Namespace for the schema used in the article */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question being asked about the article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "article_publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Number of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "answer_number" INTEGER /* Number of the answer */,
  "answer_content" TEXT /* Content of the answer */,
  "prereq_passed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if prerequisites were passed */,
  "agreement_adjusted_points" REAL /* Adjusted points for the answer */,
  "answer_explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coding_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coding agreement */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being agreed upon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who agreed */,
  "coding_perc_agreement" REAL /* Percentage agreement among coders */,
  "agreement_score" REAL /* Agreement score for the assessment */,
  "disagreement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for disagreement (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coding_agreements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "argument_types" (
  "arg_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each argument type */,
  "arg_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the argument type */,
  "question_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of question IDs associated with the argument type */,
  "arg_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the argument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arg_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "argument_questions" (
  "arg_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each argument question */,
  "arg_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the argument type */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arg_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_argument_questions_arg_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("arg_type_id") REFERENCES argument_types ("arg_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_types" (
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source type */,
  "source_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the source type */,
  "question_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of question IDs associated with the source type */,
  "source_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_questions" (
  "source_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source question */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source type */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_questions_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessor_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessor_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessor_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being scored */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the assessment */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessor_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
